lines: How many birds can you see from up here, {player}?
Counting is like building a ladder to the stars!
Numbers are like a secret language of the sky, {player}.
no_quest_line: Your number skills are reaching the sky, {player}!
quest_offer_line: Some of my cloud-sheep have wandered off. Can you help me count them back, {player}?
quest_progress_line: One, two, three... you're a natural at counting, {player}!
quest_complete_line: All present and accounted for! You're a master counter, {player}.
